monotonicity.method: a/b > c/d certified by exact integer comparison a*d > c*b

scope.exact_finite_claim: For the theorem-derived rational six-chord ether cycle, every displayed D_E, W_E, and D_E/W_E is reconstructed exactly from the SHA-pinned stored KL certificate at that level; adjacent displayed ratios decrease by exact positive cross products.
scope.nonclaim: Finite monotonicity at k=12..19 is not a k-to-infinity limit theorem, does not construct an infinite linked glider chain, and does not disprove Collatz.
